title: coryphopteris subnigra
intro: Coryphopteris subnigra is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Coryphopteris subnigra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Coryphopteris subnigra is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, and it can also be used in infusions and tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
